channel.title: Resources on Soyoung Choi
channel.description: Recent content in Resources on Soyoung Choi

item.title: Software Development
item.description: Seo, J., & Choi, S. (2018a). Ezpickr: Import various data file types as a rectangular form using a file picker dialogue box. Retrieved from https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=ezpickr Seo, J., & Choi, S. (2018b). Mboxr: Converting an mbox file into a tibble. Retrieved from https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=ezpickr
